sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112509" key="fukiofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῡκιο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing seaweed,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀκταί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
